results.rendered_html:
abhiruc 1 A.
1 To shine, look finely; dharmo'bhirocate yasmāddharmarājastataḥ smṛtaḥ  Mārk. P. 
2 To like, desire; yadabhirocate or abhirucitaṃ bhavate  V. 2 
— Caus. To be inclined to, have a taste or liking for, long, desire or wish for.
